entity.summary: Decentralized exchange application represented by a dedicated live trading domain and independently indexed exchange identity.
entity.notes: The dedicated first-party HyperBlast application endpoint is reachable. Exchange identity is independently corroborated by the completed exchange candidate corpus. Confidence remains medium because detailed public first-party protocol documentation was not recovered during this review pass.

evidence.title: HyperBlast official application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party application endpoint is reachable at review time.

evidence.title: HyperBlast exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange candidate corpus identifies HyperBlast under the dapp.hyperblast.io domain, corroborating the dedicated application identity.

evidence.title: HyperBlast exchange registry detail
evidence.notes: Exchange registry detail endpoint provides entity-specific external registry context used for this conservative active classification; no stronger lifecycle claim is made.
